plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermissions: Allow Charter Keke to access your location even when you aren't using the app

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Charter Keke to access your camera

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Charter Keke to use your microphone for voice location search.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Charter Keke to transcribe your speech when searching for pickup and destination addresses.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Charter Keke needs your location to match you with nearby rides
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Charter Keke needs your location for live tracking
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Charter Keke needs your location during active rides to support trip tracking and safety.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Charter Keke needs camera access for profile pictures and KYC
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Charter Keke uses your microphone when you choose voice location search.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Charter Keke uses speech recognition to turn your spoken pickup or destination into a location search.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Charter Keke uses your photo library only when you choose an image, such as selecting a profile picture or uploading driver vehicle and license photos for account verification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Charter Keke saves files to your photo library only when you choose to export ride details, such as saving a ride receipt image for your records.
